ns0:entry.ns0:title: BlackHatDevX/openspot-music-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BlackHatDevX/openspot-music-app
Language: typescript
OpenSpot is a free and open-source music streaming application designed for a seamless, high-fidelity listening experience. Built with a modern tech stack, it features a beautiful, responsive UI that looks great on any device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
Language: typescript
OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: czlonkowski/n8n-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp
Language: typescript
A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/firecrawl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl
Language: typescript
🔥 The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web for AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/AionUi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/AionUi
Language: typescript
Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nexu-io/nexu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nexu-io/nexu
Language: typescript
The simplest desktop client for OpenClaw 🦞 — bridge your Agent to WeChat, Feishu, Slack & Discord in one click. Works with Claude Code, Codex & any LLM. BYOK, Oauth, local-first, chat from your phone 24/7.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen
Language: typescript
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: simstudioai/sim
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/simstudioai/sim
Language: typescript
Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vas3k/TaxHacker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
Language: typescript
Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories

ns0:entry.ns0:title: virattt/dexter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/virattt/dexter
Language: typescript
An autonomous agent for deep financial research
